fields.TEXT: Открытие формы для заполнения банковской выписки

fields.FIELDVALUE1:
from datetime import datetime

date_obj = datetime.strptime(date, "%Y-%m-%d")

month_part = f" {date_obj.month}" if date_obj.month < 10 else str(date_obj.month)
day_part = f" {date_obj.day}" if date_obj.day < 10 else str(date_obj.day)

date = f"{month_part}/{day_part}/{date_obj.year}"

fields.FIELDVALUE1:
from datetime import datetime

date_obj = datetime.strptime(date, "%Y-%m-%d")

month_part = f" {date_obj.month}" if date_obj.month < 10 else str(date_obj.month)
day_part = f" {date_obj.day}" if date_obj.day < 10 else str(date_obj.day)

date = f"{month_part}/{day_part}/{date_obj.year}"
